textByHash.054170e75c6144d5e021c7ece73642d92131bd8b: Help, from me? You musht be more drunk than I am.
textByHash.08cb2ef45cd67ebdb4c5e6761b8848b929f43147: What do you mean, what am I going to do with item? That's my business it is!
textByHash.0af710caaa458215847f129ce644b8b339beb20b: Lemme think... oh yesh. Get me... item.
textByHash.124fa32ebf7f378bf3a5ae898b31cd871548d8b6: Good, good... now get me item within minutes, and I'll have ehm... I don't know, I'll have something for you!
textByHash.284e87237443af266319ac72cd0bd1b1e0a4375a: Well, I've got a Kelda hop seed right here! Pashed down generation after generation in my family...
textByHash.3aa99bc9bce33b4902c996aeda5bf31a1b1d53a1: I ashked you a shimple thing... get me item within minutes... how difficult could that have been?
textByHash.3b186d4ddf167ab828207dbde24ff37fd2424690: Got my ehm, ehm... got whatever I asked you to get yet, human?
textByHash.47cc8f52c29a3923e8aa67be994cf163b61dca0e: Lemme think... ehm... yeah, I want you to get item, no questions asked!
textByHash.688e9e6dec4eeda0ed60d3bed2617519ffe3cd1a: Did you now, did you? Ehm...
textByHash.82e2c1dd276c848caae2f314d0bebcde7f2a2121: Not interested! If you can't even keep to a shingle time limit, what good are you then?
textByHash.ad9db7a5ed12907e2efc15f104765c9e0e3449dd: I might... oh yeah, I jusht might have a sheed like that.
textByHash.aefae91ec1ca9a1b47d25e229b94a3c447101821: Awww, you're just a worthless human, stop wasting my time!
textByHash.af24cf898bf48957467afdf0a190bafdc029d918: Ooo, that'sh great! Let me get your reward... here, some coins for you.
textByHash.bf415c30512728a598048b522f37b075052180c9: Nah, I'm just kidding! Here, have the seed, you won't catch me farming in shome dirt patch anyway!
textByHash.c5f6f9c5b4f9b6fdfe7796280112452652053078: Where's my ehm... What wash it again? Oh yesh... item.
textByHash.c8c06935ca8d11b4074f510f5dabc50efbdd7bbc: Shplendid! Give that to me please!
textByHash.e3e0e13c2fde214338327217ae6610d2383c98f0: What did I ask you to get again?
textByHash.e764231ba318868247bbbd5b713245dd0eea9223: Bah, you're just a no good lousy human.
textByHash.ea6e070dfeeda1962a6f94f1e1bf76e1aca660fc: Hey you! Human person thing! I've got a lil' task for you!
textByHash.f12bef58a3fef6e1c23278a00d73f852db31b723: You can at least make the effort.
